bugs.title: Database Connection Error on Vote Submission
bugs.preconditions: User on team details page with voting form.
reproductionSteps: 2. Click on a team (e.g., Real Madrid).
3. Fill the '¡Deja tu mensaje!' form (Name, Country, Rating, Message).
bugs.expectedBehavior: Comment and vote are saved; success message is displayed; counter increments.
bugs.actualBehavior: Alert dialog appears with: 'Error al enviar el comentario. Revisa la conexión con la base de datos.'

bugs.title: Real-Time Update Failure - UI Counter Not Incrementing
bugs.preconditions: User clicks 'Votar por este club' button.
reproductionSteps: 1. Navigate to a team details page.
2. Click the 'Votar por este club' button at the top.
3. Navigate back to the dashboard or observe the total vote counter.
bugs.expectedBehavior: UI counter increments immediately or after navigation back to dashboard.
bugs.actualBehavior: No visual feedback is provided; counter remains at 0.

bugs.title: WCAG - Missing Accessible Names for Interactive Elements
bugs.preconditions: Screen reader or automated audit running.
reproductionSteps: 1. Run axe-core on the main dashboard page.
bugs.expectedBehavior: Buttons (pagination) and Selects (filters) have discernible text/labels.
bugs.actualBehavior: Pagination arrows and filter dropdowns lack accessible names.

bugs.title: UI - Text Clipping in Filters on Mobile Viewports
reproductionSteps: 2. Observe the League and Country filter buttons.
bugs.expectedBehavior: Text should wrap or be fully visible within the button boundaries.
